# عبدالمؤمن الشطوري - Abdelmomen Elshatory

> مهندس واجهات أمامية بخبرة تزيد عن 5 سنوات في بناء تطبيقات ويب حديثة وعالية الأداء

## About
Abdelmomen Elshatory (عبدالمؤمن الشطوري) is a frontend engineer with 5+ years of experience building modern, high-performance web applications with a focus on user experience. Available for freelance projects.

## Skills
- Vue.js, Nuxt.js, React, TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS, Nuxt UI
- Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB
- Cloudinary, REST APIs
- RTL/Arabic UI development

- Home: https://beingmomen.com/

- Contact: https://beingmomen.com/contact

- SDLC Guide (English): https://beingmomen.com/sdlc

## Projects
- Tiger Academy Dashboard (Nuxt 3, MongoDB, Prisma)
- Golden Tiger Academy (Nuxt 3, Nuxt UI)
- STREAMMAXY (JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap)
- Dream TV Player (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)
- Spider TV (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)

## Blog
The blog covers web development topics, JavaScript, frontend engineering, and software engineering best practices. Blog posts are available at https://beingmomen.com/blog
